templatesPanel.title: Shift templates
templatesPanel.subtitle: Define once, generate weeks in one click
templatesPanel.empty: No templates yet. Create one to get started.

schedulePage.title: Weekly schedule
schedulePage.subtitle: Interactive view of the tenant schedule. Changing the week or department refreshes the grid.

generatePage.title: Generate schedule
generatePage.subtitle: Triggers an LLM-authoritative generation for a specific week. If you pick a department or shift, only those assignments are regenerated — the rest of the week stays intact.
generatePage.weekHint: The backend resolves any date to the Monday of its ISO week.
generatePage.templateHint: Leave "All" to regenerate the whole department.
generatePage.conflictInProgress: A generation is already in progress for the week of {{weekStart}}. Wait for it to finish before triggering another.

async.queued: 📅 Queued for the week of {{weekStart}}. Waiting for worker…
async.active: ⚙️ Generating schedule for the week of {{weekStart}}…
async.completed: ✅ Generation completed for the week of {{weekStart}}.
async.failed: ❌ Generation failed for the week of {{weekStart}} ({{attempts}}/{{max}} attempts). Review your rules and try again.
async.cancelled: 🚫 Generation cancelled for the week of {{weekStart}}.

result.completed: Generation completed for the week of {{weekStart}}.
